entity.label: Bethuel
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A southern city of Judah (1 Chr. 4:30); called also Bethul (Josh. 19:4) and Bethel (12:16; 1 Sam. 30:27).

nodes.label: Bethuel
nodes.description: A southern city of Judah (1 Chr. 4:30); called also Bethul (Josh. 19:4) and Bethel (12:16; 1 Sam. 30:27).

verses.text: And at Bethuel, and at Hormah, and at Ziklag,
